semantic.role: Infrastructure configuration factory providing the canonical default configuration for the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Create and return a SpineConfig object with the current schema version and default scan policy.
Set default project metadata (name, locales) for newly initialized projects.
Initialize default empty stubs for LLM and MCP configuration sections.
outOfScope: Does not validate or merge user-supplied configurations.
Does not load configuration from disk or environment variables.
Does not handle configuration migration or schema evolution.
invariants: The returned config always uses CURRENT_CONFIG_SCHEMA_VERSION from the protocol constants.
The returned config always includes the DEFAULT_SCAN_POLICY from the core scan-policy module.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a single source of truth for default configuration values, ensuring consistency across initialization, reset, and testing scenarios.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Align with ArchSpine v1.0.0 release — stabilize the default configuration contract as part of the architectural governance layer.

publicSurface.description: Factory function that returns a fully populated SpineConfig object with current schema version, default project settings, and empty LLM/MCP stubs. Used by initialization routines and configuration resets.
